requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射——TIS 2366 / CISPR 32（多媒体设备）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射——TIS 2366 / CISPR 32（多媒體設備）

summary.en: Thailand's EMC emissions requirements for multimedia equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices — are addressed through TIS (Thai Industrial Standards) standards administered by TISI (Thai Industrial Standards Institute) under the Ministry of Industry. TIS 2366 aligns with CISPR 32 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements). Manufacturers placing wireless or multimedia devices on the Thai market must demonstrate compliance with applicable TIS EMC emissions standards. Compliance documentation should reference TIS standards and test reports from TISI-accredited or internationally accredited laboratories. TISI may require mandatory certification notification for specific product categories under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511.
summary.zh: 泰国多媒体设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备）的电磁兼容辐射要求通过工业部下属泰国工业标准局（TISI）管理的TIS（泰国工业标准）标准落实。TIS 2366与CISPR 32（多媒体设备电磁兼容辐射要求）接轨。在泰国市场销售无线或多媒体设备的制造商须证明符合适用的TIS电磁兼容辐射标准，合规文件应引用TIS标准，检测报告须来自TISI认可或国际认可的实验室。TISI可能依据《工业产品标准法》BE 2511对特定产品类别要求强制认证。
summary.zht: 泰國多媒體設備（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網設備）的電磁相容輻射要求通過工業部下屬泰國工業標準局（TISI）管理的TIS（泰國工業標準）標準落實。TIS 2366與CISPR 32（多媒體設備電磁相容輻射要求）接軌。在泰國市場銷售無線或多媒體設備的製造商須證明符合適用的TIS電磁相容輻射標準，合規文件應引用TIS標準，檢測報告須來自TISI認可或國際認可的實驗室。TISI可能依據《工業產品標準法》BE 2511對特定產品類別要求強制認證。

standards_or_laws: TIS 2366 — Multimedia equipment: Emission requirements (TISI, aligned with CISPR 32)
Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511 and amendments (Thailand, administered by TISI)

summary.en: China addresses EMC emissions for IT and multimedia equipment primarily through GB 9254 (aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625 (aligned with IEC 61000-3 for harmonics and flicker). Products within CCC scope must be certified before sale in China; others may use self-declaration against applicable GB/T standards. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC emissions documentation is not directly recognised in Thailand and does not satisfy TIS 2366 requirements.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 9254（与CISPR 22/32接轨）及GB 17625（与IEC 61000-3谐波和闪变接轨）处理IT及多媒体设备的电磁兼容辐射要求。纳入CCC范围的产品在华销售前须通过认证；其他产品可依据适用GB/T标准进行自我声明。中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容辐射文件不被泰国直接认可，不满足TIS 2366要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 9254（與CISPR 22/32接軌）及GB 17625（與IEC 61000-3諧波和閃變接軌）處理IT及多媒體設備的電磁相容輻射要求。納入CCC範圍的產品在華銷售前須通過認證；其他產品可依據適用GB/T標準進行自我聲明。中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容輻射文件不被泰國直接認可，不滿足TIS 2366要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (SAC/MIIT, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (SAC, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC emissions documentation is not directly accepted in Thailand as satisfying TIS 2366 requirements. Although both TIS 2366 and GB 9254 are based on CISPR standards, separate compliance testing against TIS 2366 is required for the Thai market. Manufacturers should ensure test reports reference TIS standards and are conducted by TISI-accredited or internationally accredited laboratories. Verify with TISI whether mandatory certification (as opposed to self-declaration) applies to the specific product category.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容辐射文件不被泰国直接接受为满足TIS 2366的证明。尽管TIS 2366和GB 9254均基于CISPR标准，仍须针对泰国市场单独依据TIS 2366进行合规测试。制造商应确保检测报告引用TIS标准，并由TISI认可或国际认可的实验室出具。请向TISI核实特定产品类别是否须强制认证（而非自我声明）。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容輻射文件不被泰國直接接受為滿足TIS 2366的證明。儘管TIS 2366和GB 9254均基於CISPR標準，仍須針對泰國市場單獨依據TIS 2366進行合規測試。製造商應確保檢測報告引用TIS標準，並由TISI認可或國際認可的實驗室出具。請向TISI核實特定產品類別是否須強制認證（而非自我聲明）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TIS EMC emissions standards (TIS 2366 / CISPR 32) apply to multimedia and wireless equipment placed on the Thai market under the Industrial Product Standards Act BE 2511; verify whether mandatory TISI certification or self-declaration applies to specific product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) or self-declaration (non-CCC) — GB 9254 / GB 17625 compliance required under SAC/MIIT framework

source.publisher: Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI), Ministry of Industry, Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TIS 2366 (aligned with CISPR 32) is the applicable EMC emissions standard for multimedia and wireless devices in Thailand. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC documentation is not a direct substitute. Separate compliance testing to TIS 2366 is required. Test reports should be from TISI-accredited or internationally accredited laboratories. Verify with TISI whether mandatory product certification applies to the specific device category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TIS 2366（与CISPR 32接轨）是泰国多媒体及无线设备适用的电磁兼容辐射标准。中国GB 9254 / CCC电磁兼容文件不可直接替代。须单独依据TIS 2366进行合规测试，检测报告应来自TISI认可或国际认可的实验室。请向TISI核实特定设备类别是否须强制产品认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TIS 2366（與CISPR 32接軌）是泰國多媒體及無線設備適用的電磁相容輻射標準。中國GB 9254 / CCC電磁相容文件不可直接替代。須單獨依據TIS 2366進行合規測試，檢測報告應來自TISI認可或國際認可的實驗室。請向TISI核實特定設備類別是否須強制產品認證。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TIS / CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 Series
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——TIS / CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4系列
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——TIS / CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4系列

summary.en: EMC immunity requirements in Thailand for multimedia and IT equipment are addressed through TIS standards aligned with CISPR 35 and the IEC 61000-4 series. Wireless and IoT devices intended for residential or commercial environments must demonstrate immunity to relevant electromagnetic disturbances in accordance with applicable TIS immunity standards. Compliance documentation should reference applicable TIS immunity standards and relevant test reports from accredited laboratories. Manufacturers should verify current applicable TIS immunity standards for their specific product category directly with TISI, as the standard landscape evolves with new IEC/CISPR editions.
summary.zh: 泰国多媒体及IT设备的电磁兼容抗扰度要求通过与CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列接轨的TIS标准落实。面向住宅或商业环境的无线及物联网设备须依据适用TIS抗扰度标准证明对相关电磁骚扰的抗扰能力。合规文件应引用适用TIS抗扰度标准，检测报告须来自认可实验室。制造商应直接向TISI核实其特定产品类别当前适用的TIS抗扰度标准，因标准体系随IEC/CISPR新版本不断更新。
summary.zht: 泰國多媒體及IT設備的電磁相容抗擾度要求通過與CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4系列接軌的TIS標準落實。面向住宅或商業環境的無線及物聯網設備須依據適用TIS抗擾度標準證明對相關電磁騷擾的抗擾能力。合規文件應引用適用TIS抗擾度標準，檢測報告須來自認可實驗室。製造商應直接向TISI核實其特定產品類別當前適用的TIS抗擾度標準，因標準體系隨IEC/CISPR新版本不斷更新。

standards_or_laws: TIS standards aligned with CISPR 35 — Multimedia equipment: Immunity requirements (TISI)
IEC 61000-4 series (as adopted via TIS) — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques

summary.en: China addresses EMC immunity for IT and multimedia equipment through GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 24) and related GB/T standards in the IEC 61000-4 series. CCC certification includes immunity testing for in-scope products. Chinese GB/T 17618 immunity documentation is not directly recognised in Thailand and does not satisfy Thai TIS EMC immunity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB/T 17618（与CISPR 24接轨）及IEC 61000-4系列相关GB/T标准处理IT及多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度。纳入CCC范围的产品认证包含抗扰度测试。中国GB/T 17618抗扰度文件不被泰国直接认可，不满足泰国TIS电磁兼容抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB/T 17618（與CISPR 24接軌）及IEC 61000-4系列相關GB/T標準處理IT及多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度。納入CCC範圍的產品認證包含抗擾度測試。中國GB/T 17618抗擾度文件不被泰國直接認可，不滿足泰國TIS電磁相容抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment: Immunity characteristics (SAC, aligned with CISPR 24)
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility testing and measurement techniques (aligned with IEC 61000-4)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17618 / CCC immunity documentation is not accepted as satisfying Thai TIS EMC immunity requirements. Although both systems derive from IEC/CISPR standards, Thai market compliance requires separate immunity testing to applicable TIS standards. The specific TIS immunity standard applicable to a given product category should be verified with TISI before testing. Manufacturers should not assume CISPR 24-based Chinese test reports satisfy CISPR 35-based Thai requirements.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17618 / CCC抗扰度文件不被接受为满足泰国TIS电磁兼容抗扰度要求的证明。尽管两者均源自IEC/CISPR标准，泰国市场合规仍须单独依据适用TIS标准进行抗扰度测试。应在测试前向TISI核实适用于特定产品类别的TIS抗扰度标准。制造商不应假设基于CISPR 24的中国检测报告可满足基于CISPR 35的泰国要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17618 / CCC抗擾度文件不被接受為滿足泰國TIS電磁相容抗擾度要求的證明。儘管兩者均源自IEC/CISPR標準，泰國市場合規仍須單獨依據適用TIS標準進行抗擾度測試。應在測試前向TISI核實適用於特定產品類別的TIS抗擾度標準。製造商不應假設基於CISPR 24的中國檢測報告可滿足基於CISPR 35的泰國要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TIS EMC immunity standards apply to multimedia and wireless equipment placed on the Thai market; verify applicable TIS immunity standard for specific device category with TISI before testing
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) or self-declaration — GB/T 17618 / GB/T 17626 series compliance under SAC/MIIT framework

source.publisher: Thai Industrial Standards Institute (TISI), Ministry of Industry, Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity requirements for wireless and multimedia devices in Thailand are governed by TISI TIS standards aligned with CISPR 35 and IEC 61000-4. Chinese GB/T 17618 / CCC immunity documentation does not substitute. Separate immunity testing to applicable TIS standards is required for the Thai market. Verify the current applicable TIS immunity standard for the specific product category with TISI before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 泰国无线及多媒体设备的电磁兼容抗扰度要求由TISI TIS标准（与CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4接轨）管辖。中国GB/T 17618 / CCC抗扰度文件不可替代。须单独依据适用TIS标准进行抗扰度测试，测试前请向TISI核实当前适用于特定产品类别的TIS抗扰度标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 泰國無線及多媒體設備的電磁相容抗擾度要求由TISI TIS標準（與CISPR 35及IEC 61000-4接軌）管轄。中國GB/T 17618 / CCC抗擾度文件不可替代。須單獨依據適用TIS標準進行抗擾度測試，測試前請向TISI核實當前適用於特定產品類別的TIS抗擾度標準。
